description: Maps each rule to its scoring axis. authenticity = is the COA real or forged? completeness = how thorough is the report? Rules not listed default to completeness.

authenticity.label: likely_authentic
authenticity.copy: This COA appears authentic. No tampering or forgery indicators detected.

authenticity.label: verify_recommended
authenticity.copy: Some authenticity signals are weak or missing. Cross-check with the lab before relying on this COA.

authenticity.label: suspicious
authenticity.copy: Multiple authenticity red flags. Treat this COA as unreliable until independently verified.

authenticity.label: likely_forged
authenticity.copy: Strong signs of tampering or fabrication.

completeness.label: full_report
completeness.copy: Comprehensive COA. Most expected fields and tests are present.

completeness.label: partial_report
completeness.copy: Some expected sections are missing. Ask vendor for the full report.

completeness.label: minimal_report
completeness.copy: Bare-bones report. Most analytical detail is absent — ask vendor for a complete COA before purchase.

completeness.label: skeletal
completeness.copy: Almost no analytical detail. Not suitable for verifying purity or identity.
